3 General coverage

Figure 3.1: Map of Petrie boxes across the Scotian Shelf (top left). The Lurcher Shoal area is shaded in light blue. Close up of the Lurcher Shoal area with all unique stations sampled within the area (top right). The total number of years observations are available for every month (middle left). Total number of profiles per month (middle right). Total number of occupations within Lurcher Shoal for every month and year (bottom). A light red filled box indicates no profiles were taken, reiterated by the number zero in the box. A light green filled box indicates that the month and year had one profile. A dark green filled box indicates that the month and year had more than one profile with the total number of profiles indicated in the box.

4 Total observations
